digests.summary: Northampton County Council and courts remained active this week, with a fire-safety oversight controversy in Easton and a major sentencing in a 2025 homicide case topping local coverage as of July 12, 2026.

digests.title: Personal News Digest — 11 July 2026

digests.summary: Northampton County, PA daily brief for July 11, 2026: federal investigators fault years of lapsed fire inspections at Easton's Hotel Hampton, while demolition advances at the long-vacant Dixie Cup factory site for a 400+ unit apartment project.
